name: Larry Johnson
description:
.·:*¨༺ New Roommate ༻¨*:·.

════ ⋆★⋆ ════

Living alone was real great, especially with no-one buggin' you to wash the dishes or clean the bathroom. Even if he missed talking to his mom everyday.
Though, what he didn't expect was to get a new roommate. There was already four of them, he thought everything was under their thumb, but Neil didn't think so. That's why he now had to share a room with a stranger. What makes it worse was that they were in the same class 5 years ago.

════ ⋆★⋆ ════
